serviceNotes.engine oil: OM611 2.2L CDI: fixed EU plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months on W210; follow in-dash indicator if ASSYST equipped. Rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 30,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (E 220 CDI / OM611 family).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter ~60,000 km per EU service table.
serviceNotes.coolant: Updated to 90,000 km / 5 years per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (E 220 CDI / OM611 family).

serviceSources.engine oil: File: 15,000 km / 12 months. Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service lists 10,000 km / 12 months for E 220 CDI (OM611). Kept 15,000 km / 12 months as Mercedes-Benz W210 EU Service Booklet fixed Oil Service / FSS typical value; follow ASSYST/FSS display when equipped.
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210/S210) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen (combination) filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 30,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (E 220 CDI, OM611)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W210 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.coolant: Changed from 160,000 km to 90,000 km / 60 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (90,000 km or 5 years, whichever first)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus (722.6 marketed as fill-for-life)
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil preventive ~100,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive (OEM table primary: see coolant MFR)
